ocr.text: In Table 1, the headers include Groups (n), Genotypes, Others, OR, 95% CI, and p value. The row labeled Ectopy (47) shows 34
(72%) for Genotypes, 12 (26%) for Others, an OR of 1 (2%), a 95% CI of 0.26, and a p value of <0.001. The row labeled
Agenesis (33) lists 22 (67%) for Genotypes, 9 (27%) for Others, an OR of 2 (6%), a 95% CI of 0.31, and a p value of 0.005.
The row labeled Hypoplasia (10) presents 7 (70%) for Genotypes, 3 (30%) for Others, an OR of 0 (0%), a 95% CI of 0.32, and
a p value of 0.095. Finally, the Controls (131) row indicates 53 (41%) for Genotypes, 71 (54%) for Others, 7 (5%) for OR, with
no provided 95% CI or p value. In Table 2, the headers are Mn2+ concentrationa, Relative activity (%)*, and Endoglucanase
activity (U·mL−1). The Control (no addition) row has a Relative activity of 100.0 and an Endoglucanase activity of 1.72. The 1
mM row shows a Relative activity of 182.2 ± 1.5 and an Endoglucanase activity of 3.08. The 2 mM row contains a Relative
activity of 201.5 ± 0.08 and an Endoglucanase activity of 3.48. The 4 mM row presents a Relative activity of 185.4 ± 9.0 and an
Endoglucanase activity of 3.28. The 8 mM row shows a Relative activity of 243.0 ± 5.7 and an Endoglucanase activity of 4.34.
The 10 mM row lists a Relative activity of 233.7 ± 1.6 and an Endoglucanase activity of 3.96.
